Dealership
hero.subheadline: For over 20 years, Elko Spas has been the Grand Strand's award-winning destination for hot tubs, pools, and game rooms. Visit our fully-loaded Myrtle Beach showroom, try before you buy, and let our expert team handle delivery, installation, and service.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Spas, Pools, Billiards &<br class="hidden md:block"> Complete Game Rooms
services.subtitle: From premium hot tubs to custom game room setups, Elko is your one-stop shop for relaxation and recreation on the Grand Strand.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Premium Hot Spring and PDC spas on display in our showroom. Salt spas and traditional models with expert guidance to find the perfect fit for your lifestyle and wellness needs.

cards.title: Swimming Pools
cards.description: Above-ground and in-ground pool sales, installation, and maintenance. Professional design consultation and expert setup for residential pools of all sizes.

cards.title: Billiards & Game Rooms
cards.description: Olhausen pool tables, game room equipment, and custom design services. See our tables on display, then let our crew handle professional delivery and setup.

cards.title: Water Care & Chemicals
cards.description: Complete water care supplies, E-Z CLOR pool chemicals, and free water testing. Our experts help you keep your spa or pool crystal clear year-round.

cards.title: Service & Repair
cards.description: Our in-house service division provides expert diagnostics, maintenance, and repair for spas, hot tubs, and pool equipment. Fast, responsive, and skilled.

cards.title: Delivery & Installation
cards.description: Professional local delivery and installation by our trained team. Precise placement, full setup walkthrough, and starter kits included with every purchase.

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Walk through our fully-loaded Myrtle Beach showroom. Sit in a hot tub, shoot a round of pool, and experience the products firsthand. Our knowledgeable staff will help you find exactly what fits your space and budget.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: From financing to delivery scheduling, we make it effortless. Our professional team coordinates every detail so your new spa, pool, or game table arrives on time and stress-free.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy
steps.description: Our trained crew delivers, installs, and walks you through everything — starter kit included. And with our in-house service team, we're always here whenever you need us.

about.label: Why the Grand Strand Trusts Elko
about.headline: Award-Winning. Family-Focused. Here for You Since 2004.
about.description: Elko Spas, Billiards & Pools has been a cornerstone of the Myrtle Beach community for over two decades. Recognized with the prestigious AQUA 100 award as a top 10 spa and pool dealership in all of North America, we've earned that distinction by treating every customer like family. Our fully-loaded showroom lets you try before you buy, our in-house service team stands behind everything we sell, and our 719+ five-star reviews speak for themselves. Whether you're soaking in a salt spa or racking up a game of 8-ball, Elko makes relaxation easy.
about.badge: AQUA 100 Award Winner — Top 10 in North America

features.title: Try Before You Buy Showroom
features.description: Our Myrtle Beach showroom has hot tubs, pools, and billiards tables on full display. Sit in, touch, and experience every product before making a decision.

features.title: In-House Service Division
features.description: We don't outsource. Our skilled technicians service everything we sell — from spa repairs to pool equipment diagnostics — quickly and professionally.

features.title: Professional Local Delivery
features.description: Our trained delivery crew handles placement, installation, and a complete walkthrough. Starter kits included so you're ready to enjoy from day one.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Visit our showroom to see real products at real prices. We offer financing options, competitive pricing on every brand we carry, and starter kits included with your purchase.

guarantee.headline: Our "Grand Strand Peace of Mind" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every product we sell is backed by our in-house service team and our 20+ year reputation. If something isn't right, we make it right — period. With 719+ five-star reviews and the AQUA 100 award on our wall, we've built this business on trust, and we plan to keep it that way. Your satisfaction is not just a promise; it's the standard we've maintained for over two decades.

faqs.question: Can I try the hot tubs before I buy?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our Myrtle Beach showroom has a full selection of hot tubs and spas on display. Come sit in them, feel the jets, and ask our staff any questions. We believe in try-before-you-buy so you can make the best decision for your home.

faqs.question: Do you offer delivery and installation?
faqs.answer: Yes — our professional local delivery and installation team handles everything. We coordinate delivery day, place your product precisely where you want it, do a full walkthrough, and provide a starter kit so you're ready to enjoy immediately.

faqs.question: What brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We're authorized dealers for Hot Spring Spas, PDC Spas, Olhausen Billiards, and more. We also carry E-Z CLOR pool chemicals and a full range of water care supplies. Visit our showroom to see everything in person.

faqs.question: Do you service products you didn't sell?
faqs.answer: Yes, our in-house service division works on most major spa and pool equipment brands. Whether you need a repair, diagnostics, or routine maintenance, give us a call and we'll get our technicians scheduled.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer financing options to make your dream spa, pool, or game room more affordable. Ask our showroom staff about current financing programs and we'll find a plan that works for your budget.

testimonials.name: Anne K.
testimonials.text: I have owned spa's before but the salt spa I bought from Elko is the best I ever owned. So easy to maintain and feels so good on your skin. And the service they give you is outstanding!

testimonials.name: Gordon T.
testimonials.text: As soon as you walk through the door, you will be greeted by an Elko staff member who, through their actions and energy, let you know customer service is a top priority. Quality products, competitive pricing, and great people.

testimonials.name: Elaine B.
testimonials.text: Elko spas service department and delivery crew are exceptional human beings. The delivery team is patient and workmanship is second to none. I now sleep like a baby in my HotSpring tub from Elko Spas!
